_source: Reference-backed complete specs for every inline Step 4 suggested build. Specs intentionally exercise app creation budgets with No Cult defaults; cult-specific builds remain optional player choices from culture-cult-map.json.

page_citations.combat_styles: references/aig-raw/cultures.json culture combatStyles entries with Combat Styles Encyclopedia citations

Praxian.name: Beast Rider Warrior
Praxian.tip: Mounted combat specialist. Lance charges and archery from the saddle.

Praxian.name: Desert Shaman
Praxian.tip: Spirit talker who survives the wastes through cunning and magic.

Praxian.name: Tribal Hunter
Praxian.tip: Patient tracker and skirmisher. Javelin and sling from a distance.

Sartarite (Heortling).name: Orlanthi Thane
Sartarite (Heortling).tip: Sword-and-shield fighter who leads from the front.

Sartarite (Heortling).name: Wind Lord Aspirant
Sartarite (Heortling).tip: Devotee of Orlanth who combines martial prowess with divine magic.

Sartarite (Heortling).name: Clan Skald
Sartarite (Heortling).tip: Storyteller and musician who inspires the warband with tales of glory.

Lunar Heartland.name: Lunar Legionary
Lunar Heartland.tip: Disciplined soldier in the Emperor's armies. Shield wall and scimitar.

Lunar Heartland.name: Seven Mothers Priestess
Lunar Heartland.tip: Devoted to the Red Goddess. Combines faith with political cunning.

Lunar Heartland.name: Heartland Spy
Lunar Heartland.tip: Works in the shadows for the Lunar Empire. Charm and a hidden blade.

Esrolian.name: Earth Priestess
Esrolian.tip: Devoted to the Earth goddesses. Political power through the temples.

Esrolian.name: Citizen Soldier
Esrolian.tip: Formation fighter defending the city-states. Spear, shield, and discipline.

Esrolian.name: Temple Scholar
Esrolian.tip: Esrolian intellectual. Knows more about Glorantha than most.

Balazaring.name: Hawk Hunter
Balazaring.tip: Hunts with trained hawks in the wild hills. Expert with longspear.

Balazaring.name: Clan Raider
Balazaring.tip: Fast and vicious. Raids neighbouring clans for cattle and glory.

Telmori Hsunchen.name: Wolf Pack Alpha
Telmori Hsunchen.tip: Fights alongside wolves. Can shapeshift during the full moon.

Telmori Hsunchen.name: Wolfbrother Shaman
Telmori Hsunchen.tip: Speaks to wolf spirits and the spirit of Telmor.

God Forgot.name: Holar Militia Guard
God Forgot.tip: Caste soldier defending the island with shield wall discipline and practical folk magic.

God Forgot.name: Zzistori Sorcerer
God Forgot.tip: Atheist wizard-caste initiate; sorcery and Law replace divine worship.

God Forgot.name: Talar Strategist
God Forgot.tip: Immortal noble-caste planner relying on status, scholarship, and defensive training.

Lunar Provincial.name: Provincial Hoplite
Lunar Provincial.tip: Tarshite or provincial soldier drilled in Lunar shield-wall tactics.

Lunar Provincial.name: Colonial Survivalist
Lunar Provincial.tip: Frontier survivor who knows how to pass among locals and stay alive.

Lunar Provincial.name: Seven Mothers Envoy
Lunar Provincial.tip: Provincial Lunar negotiator balancing imperial loyalties and local cult ties.

citations: Mythras Core Rulebook 3rd Printing 2018 p.13-31 (character creation point budgets)
